user.title: Power Sensors
user.description: Map your power measurement sensors. Use sensors that report instantaneous power in Watts.

data.house_power_sensor: House consumption sensor (W, optional — computed if absent)

battery.title: Battery Storage
battery.description: Configure your battery system. Charge and discharge switches can be physical switches or input_booleans that trigger automations.

ev.title: EV Charger (optional)
ev.description: Leave blank if you don't have an EV charger.

tariff.title: Electricity Tariff
tariff.description: Provide a sensor with the current electricity price. The EMS uses this to decide when to charge from the grid.

data.cheap_tariff_threshold: Cheap threshold — charge when price is below (€/kWh)
data.expensive_tariff_threshold: Expensive threshold — discharge when price is above (€/kWh)
